name: Pecan Crescents
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Unsalted butter, melted and cooled (3 sticks)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cornstarch, baking powder, baking soda, cream of tartar, salt, and nutmeg.
2. Add the melted butter to the dry ingredients and mix until crumbly.
3. Gradually add the confectioners' sugar and vanilla extract to the mixture, stirring until combined.
4. Fold in the chopped pecans.
5. Cover the dough and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before rolling out.
6. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/8 inch thick.
7. Cut into strips and roll up tightly.
8. Place the rolled crescents on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Turn off the heat and remove from the oven, letting the crescents cool completely before serving.
